title: Events Executive/ Manager
description:
We can’t promise to fix all your problems at work but we can promise you won’t have to face them alone! Here at Twist, you are never alone!


They are right when they say events people are fun and happening. Yes, we are but as we play hard, we work hard too! We believe the only way to do great work is to love what we do. If you have not found it yet, you either keep looking or come say hello to us!


At Twist, we create leaders and not followers. Everyone is unique in their own ways and the time will come for them to shine. Our experienced managers have the skills and knowledge, waiting to impart to you. It may be a tough to journey to embark on but we promise it is worth it. We are ready to offer whenever you are ready too!


YOLO! Choose a job you love and you will never work a day in your life!


About TWIST


Behind the extraordinary success of Twist Media is a team of passionate and dedicated professionals, who do what they love and love what they do. When the global pandemic hit, we didn’t just adapt, we led the way! From live events to virtual and now hybrid events, we’re always ahead of the curve. At Twist, every day is a new adventure. From epic conferences to cozy networking nights, national campaigns to wild parties – we do it all! Get ready to be part of something extraordinary at Twist!


Check out our facebook https://www.facebook.com/twistmedia.sg/and website www.twistmedia.sg to learn more about our events and our twisters’ culture!


Responsibilities

- Plan and execute LIVE, VIRTUAL and HYBRID events

- Brainstorm and pitch with quality proposal and costings independently to win jobs (with supervision for newbies!)

- Contribute during brainstorming sessions with the creative team

- Source, negotiate and manage suppliers for our events

- Assist in pre-planning, setup/ teardown and onsite management for events

- Professionally manage clients

- Develop new business opportunities

- Ad-hoc duties as assigned


Requirements

- Minimum Diploma holder or at least 1 year experience in events

- Passionate about events and able to work long hours (if required)

- Good spoken and written English (mandatory)

- Ability to converse in mandarin with suppliers

- Able to multi-task and be meticulous at work

- Experience with virtual events is a bonus!

- Proficient in Microsoft Office Word, Excel and Powerpoint


If you are ready, we are ready for you too! Say hello to us and send us your CV.


“The only way to do great work is to LOVE what you do”.

Join TWIST and do great work!

postedCompany.description:
TWIST MEDIA PTE. LTD.

Behind the extraordinary success of Twist Media is a team of passionate and dedicated professionals, who do what they love and love what they do. Overtime, we have built up a strong network of clienteles from the government agencies and corporate organisations. No event is too big or small for us. The events we managed include conferences & seminars, awards ceremonies, national campaigns, exhibitions and many more.
